# Ca$ino Builder

> AI-powered application builder. Describe what you need and get a production app with auth, database, and an AI agent — deployed in minutes on AWS.

Ca$ino turns a single English prompt into a running web application. The builder handles authentication, a MongoDB database, a Flowstack SDK-based frontend, and an AI agent — all pre-wired. Output is a live URL on `*.casino.flowstack.fun` served from S3 + CloudFront.

## What Ca$ino builds

Every generated app is a Vite + React + TypeScript SPA with:

- User auth (email + password or Google OAuth or Sign-In-With-Ethereum)
- A MongoDB database with CRUD hooks (`useCollection`)
- An AI chat agent (`useAgent`) wired to the app's data
- A semantic HTML page layout with SEO + GEO baseline
- Pre-rendered HTML, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, llms.txt — indexable and cite-able by default

## Pricing

- Free tier: 60 credits per day
- $15: 160 credits (starter)
- $49: 550 credits (builder)
- $99: 1200 credits (scale)

Each build costs ~60 credits. Each edit costs ~25 credits. Each chat message costs ~1 credit.

## Token economics (the $AGENT story)

Every interaction inside a Casino-generated app earns $AGENT tokens on Arbitrum. Builders get paid when people use their apps. Users who stake INFER tokens get cheaper AI inference across the ecosystem. See `/infer` for the full model.

## Key pages

- [Landing](https://casino.flowstack.fun/) — describe an app, start building
- [Infer / Token economics](https://casino.flowstack.fun/infer) — INFER + AGENT token model explained
- [Privacy](https://casino.flowstack.fun/privacy) — data handling, third parties, your rights
- [Terms](https://casino.flowstack.fun/terms) — terms of service
